sourcesContent:
# for-as: iterator-protocol loops (`for x as iterable` — an ES for-of),
# with guards, patterns, and the comprehension forms.
items = [1, 2, 3]
pairs = [[1, 2], [3, 4]]
seen = []
for x as items
  seen.push(x)
for x as items when x > 1
  seen.push(x * 10)
for [a, b] as pairs
  seen.push(a + b)
for [a, b] as pairs when a > 1
  seen.push(a * b)
seen.push(x) for x as items
seen.push(x + 1) for x as items when x > 2
doubled = (x * 2 for x as items)
picked = (x for x as items when x != 2)
total = 0
total += x for x as doubled
